title: Passive Aggressive Sound
description: Dependency of the Passive Aggressive datapack.
body:
## About 
Extremely simple, yet necessary, this resource pack provides the required sounds for the [Passive Aggressive](https://modrinth.com/datapack/passive-aggressive) datapack. Use it for the full experience of the latter.\
Before proceeding, please read the following section to avoid any mistakes or unnecessary confusion.

## Please Note
Just some useful info :-)
- Will not affect any gameplay without having the base datapack installed alongside.
- Already embedded within the mod version (**no need to download this pack if using the mod version of [Passive Aggressive](https://modrinth.com/datapack/passive-aggressive)**).
